subcodes.title: Words spoken during filming of motion picture on 1912-06-18
subcodes.first_line: Observe the power of the Ancient Beauty and the influence of the Greatest Name through which He has united us with the people of America in this way
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملاحظهٴ قدرت جمال قدم و نفوذ اسم اعظم نمائید که ما را با اهل امریکا باین نحو الفت و اتحاد داده
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
